Scribble Party

# Scribble Party

Launching today

## A local-first whiteboard studio for teachers and creators

14 followers

## A local-first whiteboard studio for teachers and creators

14 followers

Visit website

Digital whiteboards

Most lesson recorders send your video to someone's cloud and want an account first. Scribble Party runs entirely in your browser. Draw on an infinite canvas, drop a live camera bubble of yourself on the board (it cuts out your background), and record the whole thing with your voice. Recordings save to your device as you go, so a crashed tab doesn't lose a take. Works offline as an installed app. No signup, no install, nothing ever uploaded!

# Scribble PartyAlternatives

Exploring alternatives to Scribble Party’s local‑first whiteboard? Try Excalidraw for hand‑drawn diagrams, Loom for quick async walkthroughs, and Tella for polished screen demos. Team-first options like Bubbles and Floik help turn ideas into interactive guides.

results.title: Molku AI: Autofill PDFs & Google Sheets | Product Hunt
results.content:
Konstantin Elovenko
Molku AI

Molku AI

@abbas143official Molku does great with handwritting 😌 (even phone-camera shots and light smudges). The only case it still struggles with are those “even-a-human-can’t-read-this” scribbles.

As for the Notion. You can already push data to Notion through Zapier/Make, but a native connector isn’t off the table. We build integrations in the order users ask for them. If you (and others) need direct Notion support, give us a shout and we’ll move it up the roadmap.

Your feedback shapes what we ship

Tommy Wang
Stepfun Diligence Check

Stepfun Diligence Check

This looks like a game-changer! [...] Zapier & Make integrations

🤔 Where to start

Sign up at molku.ai — no credit card. Use code PRODUCTHUNT for 10 % off any paid plan if you stick around.

We move fast on user requests, so tell us what would make your life easier.

Questions? Drop them below, DM me, or book a 10-min call — happy to help.

Thanks for the support and feedback! ❤️

Kay Kwak

@konstantin\_elovenko Really impressed by the support for handwritten text and diverse file types. Congratulations! 🔥

Ghulam Abbas

Huge congratulations on the launch! This looks incredibly useful! 🔥  
The handwritten text recognition is a killer feature – how does the AI handle messy or low-quality handwriting? Also, any plans to add direct Notion integration in the future?

Konstantin Elovenko
